content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.62%, Bank Nifty -1.02%, VIX +2.47% to 17.03 — broad index weakness with rising vol. However, IT sector is bid (+0.99%) and individual results-day movers (PIDILITIND, SRF, MARICO, BHARATFORG, COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO) are showing strong post-earnings momentum. Existing book has multiple winners deserving SL trails; new admits are limited given index weakness and 61% deployment.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5% winner. CMP 1086.80 with stored SL 1072.12 (~1.3% below CMP) — already tightly trailed and within 1% trail-gap discipline. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; HOLDing existing SL/target. Re-emitting as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5%, SL already at 1072.12 (8.9% above entry, locking solid gain). Bullish Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). SL appropriately tight given proximity to 52w high 1141.90. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF -0.6%, SL 121 (~2.7% below CMP) intact. VIX rising supports safe-haven thesis. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at +0.9%, post-Q4 momentum (PAT +18%, revenue +22%). Move SL to breakeven 820 (from 818) — tiny tighten but locks zero-loss. CMP 828.20, SL 820 = 1% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline. Target 855 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.1% winner after +17% post-Q4 surge. Stored SL 1341.52 vs CMP 1368.70 = ~2% gap, within trail-gap discipline. No-op — emitting as HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8%, SL 3030 (~1.2% below CMP 3065.10) — already tightly placed near breakeven. Bullish Q4, NGC contract catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.0% winner. Stored SL 825 vs CMP 839.40 = ~1.7% gap, within discipline. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at +0.0% post-Q4 results. Strong fundamentals (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280 bps). SL 1445 (~3% below CMP) gives setup room. HOLD to allow thesis to play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, SL 1580 (~1.8% below CMP 1608.80). Q4 turnaround thesis intact (PAT Rs 164 Cr vs loss YoY, Zaynich NDA accepted). Within SL absorption budget. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.0%, SL 2745 (~1.6% below CMP 2790.60). Post-Q4 +10.62% move with bullish thesis (PAT +47% YoY FY26, refrigerant capex doubled). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, SL 9020 (~1.1% below CMP 9123.50). Record Q4 (revenue +27%, dividend Rs 47), W&C market share gain. Within trail-gap discipline. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL 1955 (~2.1% below CMP 1999.50). Defence vertical thesis (revenue +46% YoY, order book Rs 10,961 Cr) intact despite NA Class 8 truck headwind. Within absorption budget. HOLD per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, SL 354 (~2.6% below CMP 363.55). Q4 PAT +30.6%, brokerage upgrades. Within absorption budget. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, SL 10440 (~2.4% below CMP 10695). Buyback at Rs 12,000 (~12% premium) and dividend Rs 150 catalysts intact. Strong Q4 (PAT +34%). HOLD per Rule 17."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1072.12 already tightly trailed at +9% from entry; within 1.3% of CMP — appropriate for momentum continuation, no further tighten needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold; SL 121 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 818 to 820 (breakeven). Locks zero-loss while preserving recovery option to target 855."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 already locks +6.6% from entry; ~2% gap from CMP, ample but not loose. Letting winner run to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 is essentially breakeven, 1.2% below CMP. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks +2.4% from entry; 1.7% gap from CMP, within trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered post-Q4, give thesis room. SL 1445 = -3% absorption budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1580 within entry-time absorption; do not preempt SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat to entry; thesis intact, SL 2745 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 9020 within trail-gap discipline at 1.1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Mild loss within SL absorption; intraday wobble is not new information per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tiny unrealized loss, thesis intact (Q4 PAT +30.6%). SL 354 is the worst-case absorption."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sub-1% loss; buyback/dividend catalysts pending. SL 10440 absorbs normal noise."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DABUR open BUY @ 487 from earlier — leaving in place; thesis intact post-Q4 +5.98%. HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 3419m ago is STALE (prior session) — should be cancelled by engine but flagging. Qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates today not admitted with rationale (per Rule 18): NUVAMA — BEARISH per research (SEBI warning + 3 NSE actions on subsidiary, Q4 results May 11 = binary event in 2 sessions per Rule 11), reject. BAJAJ-AUTO conf +0.10 — already held, no add (concentration). PIDILITIND, SRF, MARICO, COFORGE, BHARATFORG, ABCAPITAL, CAMS, PNBHOUSING — all already held. POLYCAB conf +0.05 already held. WOCKPHARMA already held. THERMAX/PERSISTENT/LAURUSLABS/LUPIN/INDUSINDBK/RAMCOCEM/APOLLOTYRE/KEI/GABRIEL/FINCABLES/TATATECH/DABUR — not in deep-dive batch with sufficient detail today; TATATECH carries Goldman SELL TP 470 (~25% downside) and FY26 PAT decline -19% — reject. Effectively the Q4-results bullish names are already in the book; no obviously qualifying new BUY surfaces.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 61.3%, cash 38.7% — within soft-target range. Book is heavily Q4-results-driven momentum (8 of 13 holdings reported strong Q4 in last 3-5 sessions). Sector exposure spread: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL ~15.6%), FMCG (MARICO, GOLDBEES safe-haven proxy), IT (COFORGE), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG ~10.5% — Auto cluster cap watching), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND ~10.4%), Capital Goods (GRSE, POLYCAB ~9.5%), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA). No cluster >20% of capital. VIX +2.47% and Nifty -0.62% argue against new cyclical admits this afternoon; book management is the priority. Trailing MARICO SL to breakeven is the only actionable adjustment — other winners already have appropriately-tightened SLs from prior sessions per the trail-gap discipline."
}
